The UI supports both manual entry and file upload into the same validated pipeline.
textPreview: The UI supports both manual entry and file upload into the same validated pipeline.

text:
Manual document creation

Users enter title, content, tags, and metadata JSON. The same form can save only or save and embed immediately using POST /api/documents?index=true.
textPreview: Manual document creation |  | Users enter title, content, tags, and metadata JSON. The same form can save only or save and embed immediat...

text:
File upload

Users upload UTF-8 text-like files: .txt, .md, .markdown, .json, .csv, and .log. The upload endpoint creates a normal document and records file metadata.

text: Sources: repository README/docs/code; Microsoft Learn: What's new in .NET 9, What's new in .NET 10, What's new in C# 13, What's new in C# 14.
Chunking is deterministic, paragraph-aware, and repeatable for search debugging.
textPreview: Chunking is deterministic, paragraph-aware, and repeatable for search debugging.

text:
1. Split

Content is split on blank-line paragraph boundaries where possible.
textPreview: 1. Split |  | Content is split on blank-line paragraph boundaries where possible.

text:
2. Estimate

Token estimate uses ceiling(text length / 4) for predictable local chunk sizing.
textPreview: 2. Estimate |  | Token estimate uses ceiling(text length / 4) for predictable local chunk sizing.

text:
3. Fill

Paragraphs are added until target token count would be exceeded.
textPreview: 3. Fill |  | Paragraphs are added until target token count would be exceeded.

text:
4. Overlap

A bounded overlap buffer carries recent paragraphs into the next chunk.
textPreview: 4. Overlap |  | A bounded overlap buffer carries recent paragraphs into the next chunk.

text: Each chunk keeps metadata: documentTitle, chunkIndex, sourceType, tokenEstimate, embedding model, dimensions, and generated timestamp.
textPreview: Each chunk keeps metadata: documentTitle, chunkIndex, sourceType, tokenEstimate, embedding model, dimensions, and generated timestamp.

text: Sources: repository README/docs/code; Microsoft Learn: What's new in .NET 9, What's new in .NET 10, What's new in C# 13, What's new in C# 14.
Two retrieval paths expose different strengths before hybrid ranking combines them.
textPreview: Two retrieval paths expose different strengths before hybrid ranking combines them.

text:
Keyword search

Uses lexical weights across title (+5), tags (+4), summary (+3), chunk content (+2), and document content (+1). It is strongest when the query names exact technical terms.
textPreview: Keyword search |  | Uses lexical weights across title (+5), tags (+4), summary (+3), chunk content (+2), and document content (+1). It is...

text:
Semantic search

Generates a query embedding, compares it to chunk vectors with pgvector cosine distance, and converts distance into a vector score. It is strongest when wording differs from the source.
textPreview: Semantic search |  | Generates a query embedding, compares it to chunk vectors with pgvector cosine distance, and converts distance into ...

text: Sources: repository README/docs/code; Microsoft Learn: What's new in .NET 9, What's new in .NET 10, What's new in C# 13, What's new in C# 14.
Hybrid search gathers candidates broadly, then ranks the strongest signal per chunk.
textPreview: Hybrid search gathers candidates broadly, then ranks the strongest signal per chunk.

text:
Re-ranking steps

1. Run semantic at 2x limit.
2. Run keyword at 2x limit.
3. Group candidates by chunk id.
4. Keep max vector and keyword signals.
5. Add recency and sort by final score.
textPreview: Re-ranking steps |  | 1. Run semantic at 2x limit. | 2. Run keyword at 2x limit. | 3. Group candidates by chunk id. | 4. Keep max vector ...

The agent retrieves local chunks first; it does not train on the local database.
textPreview: The agent retrieves local chunks first; it does not train on the local database.

text:
Prompt guardrails

Use retrieved local context, say when context is insufficient, and do not invent citations.
textPreview: Prompt guardrails |  | Use retrieved local context, say when context is insufficient, and do not invent citations.

text:
Inspectable output

The app stores retrieval duration, answer generation duration, citation count, answer text, and run steps.
textPreview: Inspectable output |  | The app stores retrieval duration, answer generation duration, citation count, answer text, and run steps.
